title: Reinstate stack-managed backup vault creation for Amplify backup stack
description: Replace BackupVault import-by-name with BackupVault creation in dashboard/amplify/backend.ts so new accounts/environments can bootstrap without precreating a vault. User will manually delete existing staging vault before deploy.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Implementing user-requested revert: replace BackupVault.fromBackupVaultName with new backup.BackupVault in dashboard/amplify/backend.ts so stack can bootstrap vaults in fresh accounts. User stated staging vault will be manually removed before deploy.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text:
Implemented: restored stack-managed backup vault creation in dashboard/amplify/backend.ts by replacing BackupVault.fromBackupVaultName(...) with new backup.BackupVault(...).

Validation:
- Ran npm run typecheck in dashboard.
- Typecheck fails with pre-existing TypeScript/dependency issues across many UI files (missing module/type declarations).
- No reported errors reference dashboard/amplify/backend.ts.
